## 🚨 Critical Alerts — Two Separate Issues

### Alert 1: Subject Block Completely Wrong on Individuals

Both DIN entries are data artifacts — **neither person has any connection to Kemplast Industries:**

| Subject Block Entry | Actual Person | Actual Role | Cause of Error |
|---|---|---|---|
| "India Infoline Mr Sumit Maheshwari" (DIN 06920646) | Sumit Maheshwari | Director: Thomas Cook India, Fairchem Organics, CSB Bank | "India Infoline" is data source label, not employer |
| "Reappointment of Mr Ramkumar Shankar" (DIN 00018391) | Ramkumar Shankar | **MD of Chemplast Sanmar Ltd.** | "Chemplast" ≠ "Kemplast" — name confusion |

**Actual owner:** Ravi Rambhai Patel (confirmed via TradeIndia + Gujarat HC case)

### Alert 2: 2015 Gujarat HC Criminal Case

**SCA 14466/2015** — Ravi Rambhai Patel & others vs State of Gujarat (CAV Order, Aug 5, 2015): Kemplast Industries' Hydrochloric Acid was sold to Shree Ram Textiles; investigating agency alleged acid belonged to Kemplast and their direction caused harm. Outcome unknown (11 years old). Recommend verifying case disposition before significant exposure.
